content.text:
Perfect! All tests pass. Now I'll proceed to the Refactor phase by launching the refactor agent.

**Green Phase Complete:**

Implementation: Added a negative damage validation check at the start of `processClaim` that throws an error if the damage amount is less than zero.

Result: All tests now pass (20 passing, 6 todo)

Approach: This is minimal - I added only a single guard clause that checks if `damage < 0` and throws an error. The check is placed before the zero-damage check to ensure negative values are rejected immediately. This is the simplest possible implementation to make the test pass without adding any logic beyond what the test demands.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
